CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISBLANK(ContractPaymentAgreement.Contract.EE_NP_PA_Hourly_Blended__c), ContractPaymentAgreement.Contract.EE_NP_PA_Hourly_Blended__c == 0 ), 0, IF( ISBLANK(Shift__c), 0, IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Shift__c)), Shift__r.Shift_Name__r.Name <> "Shift Bonus" ), ContractPaymentAgreement.Contract.EE_NP_PA_Hourly_Blended__c, 0 ) ) )
CustomField.label: EE NP/PA Hourly Blended
